text: Tibo says the product has become very good after recent @steipete work, and that GPT-5.5 is giving his best experience so far, much better than two weeks earlier. He quotes Sam Altman's post saying users can sign in to Openclaw with a ChatGPT account and use their subscription there.
Image-only Codex culture post, visible as a meme about improving after each Codex update.
Codex pronunciation and naming culture post. It became one of the highest-view visible posts in this batch.

Tibo says users can hatch a pet in the Codex app, and that it makes him more productive because context follows him around while multitasking. He quotes OpenAI Developers' Codex Pets post: use /pet to wake your pet.
Short Codex product-culture post: 'Feeling codexy today (but in a fun way).'
